topic: My reflection in the bathroom mirror blinks a second after I do
title: My Reflection Blinks a Second After I Do | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: My reflection in the bathroom mirror blinks a half second after I do. Lately it has started to smile on its own.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a bathroom mirror over a sink reflecting a dim face, the reflection slightly off, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Old apartment. One mirror over the sink. I shave there each morning.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a small old apartment bathroom at night, a single mirror over a sink, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing
close shot of a steamy bathroom mirror with a faint reflection, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: One morning I blinked and the reflection blinked a beat too late.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a face reflected in a mirror with eyes half closed, slight asymmetry, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing
close shot of wide open eyes reflected in a bathroom mirror, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: So did it. Then it blinked alone.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a mirror reflection blinking while the viewer does not, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing
close shot of a left hand raised before a bathroom mirror, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The reflection waited, then raised its right.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a mirror reflection raising the opposite hand a beat later, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Now it lags more each day. Sometimes it is still watching after I turn away.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a dim mirror reflection seeming to linger, the room turned away, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Last night I leaned in close. The reflection stayed back, smiling, and shook its head.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a face leaning toward a mirror while the reflection stays back faintly smiling, dim light, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I covered the mirror with a sheet.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a bathroom mirror covered with a white sheet, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: This morning the sheet was on my side. The mirror was bare, and I was already in it.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of an uncovered bathroom mirror with a fallen sheet on the floor, a dim figure already in the glass, low light, vertical 9:16 framing
